slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right corner: 소아과언니 in deep navy #1A1F36 Pretendard SemiBold — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 011. Left side upper area: very large bold Korean headline two lines — first line 타이레놀 vs 부루펜 in deep navy, second line 교차복용 가이드 in teal #2C6E63. Below headline: small muted gray subtitle 언제, 어떻게 병용할까 · AAP 권장 기준. Right side center-bottom: large clean editorial illustration of two medicine bottles side by side with alternating arrows between them, line art style in teal and coral, minimal clean strokes. Bottom area: thin teal horizontal accent line. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small teal rounded label: 기본 원칙. Large bold headline: 먼저 알아야 할 in deep navy, 사용 연령 in teal #2C6E63. Center: clean editorial illustration of baby and toddler silhouettes with age markers, line art teal/navy minimal. Below: two light gray #F0F0EE rounded cards stacked vertically. First card: bold navy 아세트아미노펜 (타이레놀) + small text 생후 2개월부터 사용 가능 + teal checkmark. Second card: bold navy 이부프로펜 (부루펜) + small text 생후 6개월부터 사용 가능 + teal checkmark. Bottom small gray: 생후 6개월 미만은 아세트아미노펜 선호. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small teal rounded label: 용량 & 간격. Large bold headline: 각 약물의 in deep navy, 투여 원칙 in teal #2C6E63. Center: clean editorial illustration of medicine dropper with measurement markings, line art teal/navy minimal. Below: two light gray #F0F0EE rounded cards stacked. First card: bold navy 아세트아미노펜 + bullet text 체중 kg당 10-15mg + 4-6시간 간격 + 하루 최대 5회. Second card: bold navy 이부프로펜 + bullet text 체중 kg당 5-10mg + 6-8시간 간격 + 하루 최대 4회. Bottom small gray source: University of Washington Pediatric Care Center, 2024. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small teal rounded label: 교차복용 효과. Large bold headline: 병용하면 in deep navy, 더 효과적일까 in teal #2C6E63. Center: clean editorial illustration of thermometer with downward arrow, line art teal/navy minimal. Below: light gray #F0F0EE rounded card with generous padding. Bold teal ✓ 해열 효과 + navy text 단일 해열제보다 더 좋을 수 있음 (Pediatrics, 2024). Below horizontal divider. Bold coral ⚠️ 주의점 + navy text 약물 투여 오류 위험 증가 가능. Bottom small gray source: AAP Pediatrics Network Meta-Analysis, 2024. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small teal rounded label: 교차복용 방법. Large bold headline: 교차복용은 in deep navy, 언제 하나요 in teal #2C6E63. Center: clean editorial illustration of clock with 2-3 hour interval markers and two medicine bottles, line art teal/navy minimal. Below: light gray #F0F0EE rounded card. Bold navy numbered list. 1. 한 해열제 복용 후 2-3시간 간격 두기. 2. 다른 성분 해열제 사용. 3. 38도 이상 고열 지속 시 고려. Bottom coral outline box: ⚠️ bold coral 고려 시점 + small navy 한 해열제로 효과 없을 때만. Bottom small gray source: BMC Medicine, 2006 & Medscape, 2024. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small teal rounded label: 안전성. Large bold headline: 병용해도 in deep navy, 안전할까요 in teal #2C6E63. Center: clean editorial illustration of two medicine pathways diverging (liver and kidney icons), line art teal/navy minimal. Below: light gray #F0F0EE rounded card. Bold teal ✓ 안전한 이유 + navy text 대사 경로가 서로 다름 + 약물 상호작용 없음. Below horizontal divider. Bold coral ⚠️ 주의 사항 + navy text 각 약물의 하루 최대 용량 초과 금지 + 투여 시간·용량 정확히 기록. Bottom small gray source: Current Medical Research and Opinion, 2021 & AAP Pediatrics, 2024. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small coral rounded label: 주의 상황. Large bold headline: 이럴 땐 in deep navy, 피해야 합니다 in coral #C44536. Center: clean editorial illustration of warning triangle with water drop and virus icon, line art coral/navy minimal. Below: two coral outline rounded boxes stacked. First box: bold coral ⚠️ 탈수 위험 시 + navy text 이부프로펜 사용 시 신장 손상 위험 증가 + 구토·설사 동반 시 주의. Second box: bold coral ⚠️ 수두 감염 시 + navy text 이부프로펜 사용 금지 + 중증 연조직 감염 위험. Bottom small gray source: AAP Pediatrics, 2024 & Italian Journal of Pediatrics, 2021. Bottom thin coral divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small mustard #B8860B rounded label: 통념 깨기. Large bold headline: 해열제 사용의 in deep navy, 진짜 목표 in mustard #B8860B. Center: clean editorial illustration of comfortable child icon with heart symbol, line art mustard/navy minimal. Below: light gray #F0F0EE rounded card with generous padding. Bold mustard ✗ 체온 정상화가 목표 아님. Bold teal ✓ 아이를 편안하게 하는 것이 목표. Below horizontal divider. Bold coral ⚠️ 과량 복용 위험 + navy text 아세트아미노펜 → 간 손상 + 이부프로펜 → 위장관·신장 손상. Bottom small gray source: AAP Pediatrics, 2024 & Current Medical Research and Opinion, 2021. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE. Large bold headline center: 오늘 확인하고 in deep navy, 저장하세요 in teal #2C6E63 with thin teal underline. Source box light gray #F0F0EE rounded generous padding. 출처 in navy small bold. · Pediatrics (AAP) Network Meta-Analysis, 2024. · University of Washington Pediatric Care Center, 2024. · Current Medical Research and Opinion, 2021. · Italian Journal of Pediatrics, 2021. Horizontal thin navy divider. 소아과언니 in navy bold large center — NO quotes, NO decoration. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 in gray small. Thin gray divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 in navy. 소아과수첩 앱 · 약봉투 스캔으로 복용 기록 관리 in teal. No pixel text anywhere. No quotes anywhere on card.

common_style:
# 에디토리얼 모던 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 흰색 #FAFAF7
- 텍스트: deep navy #1A1F36
- 강조 (팔레트 A): coral #C44536
- 강조 (팔레트 B): teal #2C6E63
- 카드 배경: light gray #F0F0EE
- 일러스트: clean line art editorial style (coral/navy 조합)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 navy (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## 팔레트 결정
- 팔레트 A (coral): 일반 케어·예방법·여행·생활건강
- 팔레트 B (teal): 수치·기준·데이터 중심

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. Clean white background #FAFAF7.
Top-right: 소아과언니 deep navy #1A1F36 Pretendard SemiBold — 4 characters only, no quotes.
Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · [번호].
Left upper: very large bold headline two lines — [첫 줄] deep navy, [핵심 단어] coral #C44536.
Below: small muted gray subtitle [부제] · AAP 권장 기준.
Right center-bottom: LARGE clean editorial illustration [토픽 관련], line art coral/teal minimal.
Bottom: thin coral horizontal accent line.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## BODY 패턴 (slide n:2-8)
Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. White background #FAFAF7.
Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes.
Top-left small coral rounded label: [섹션명].
Large bold headline: [앞부분] navy, [마지막 핵심 단어] coral #C44536.
Center: clean editorial illustration [토픽 관련], line art coral/navy minimal.
Content: [리스트 or 카드 구조 — 토픽에 맞게].
Bottom thin coral divider.
No pixel text. No quotes.

## 비교 카드 패턴
Two comparison cards side by side.
Left ✓ card light gray: teal checkmark + bold text + small caption.
Right ✗ card light gray: coral X + bold text + small caption.
Bottom small gray source text.

## 경고 박스 패턴
Coral outline rounded box.
⚠️ + bold coral warning text + navy detail text + small gray source.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350. Editorial modern style. White background #FAFAF7.
Top-right: 소아과언니 navy small — 4 characters only, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE.
Large bold headline center: 오늘 확인하고 navy, 저장하세요 coral #C44536 thin underline.
Source box light gray #F0F0EE rounded generous padding.
출처 (navy small bold)

소아과언니 navy bold large center — NO quotes, NO decoration.
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small.
Thin gray divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 navy.
